title: The West Godavari District (Assimilation of Laws on Federal Subjects) Act, 1949
full_text: The West Godavari District (Assimilation of Laws on Federal Subjects) Act, 1949 पश्‍चिम गोदावरी जिला (संघीय विषय विधि एकरूपता) अधिनियम, 1949 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194920 Act Number: 20 Enactment Date: 1949-04-14 Act Year: 1949 Short Title: The West Godavari District (Assimilation of Laws on Federal Subjects) Act, 1949 Hindi Title: पश्‍चिम गोदावरी जिला (संघीय विषय विधि एकरूपता) अधिनियम, 1949 Long Title: An Act to assimilate certain laws in force in different parts of the West Godavari District of the Province of Madras. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-07-1949 Notification: 1st July, 1949, see Notification No. F. 94/49, dated the 24th June, 1949, Gazette of India, 1949, Part I. Last Updated: 08-04-2019 Schedule 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Interpretation. Section 3. Assimilation of laws. Section 4. Provision for removal of difficulties. Schedule 1.
